answers: Beginner video editors: DaVinci Resolve (free, professional), CapCut (free, easy), iMovie (Mac), Kdenlive (free, Linux).
Editing basics: import footage, cut/trim clips, add transitions (sparingly!), adjust audio, color correct, and export.
Tips: cut on action, use J/L cuts for smooth audio transitions, keep it tight (remove dead air), and match music to pacing.
Video edit shekha: DaVinci Resolve (free) install koro, YouTube tutorials dekho, ar practice koro — prothome short video banao.
